judgment_detail: The current exported folder is not literally README-faithful because executable counted code spans the top-level train_gpt.py launcher plus two shipped Psionic runtime binaries. The difference is now explicit rather than implied: the report binds the exact launcher, replay runtime, real single-H100 trainer, runtime manifest, real execution contract, and immutable input-package descriptor bytes so maintainers can review one concrete equivalence argument instead of inferring it from scattered artifacts.

relevant_artifacts.detail: required top-level entrypoint named by the public README; all later execution modes still flow through this launcher
default exported-folder executable payload for bounded local-reference replay
additional exported-folder executable payload for explicit single-H100 trainer dispatch
machine-readable manifest that binds train_gpt.py to the shipped default runtime surface
machine-readable contract that widens the entrypoint into explicit single-H100 trainer execution
immutable remote-input descriptor carried forward into the explicit real-execution path

claim_boundary: This report answers only the exported record-surface question. It makes the current train_gpt.py-versus-shipped-runtime difference explicit for maintainer review, but it does not by itself prove record-track acceptance or close the 8xH100 execution lane.
